description: Worked across services, infrastructure, and delivery systems to improve local development, system testing, CI/CD reliability, and cross-team platform capabilities in a complex multi-service environment.
highlights: Designed and implemented a containerized local development and system test platform using Docker and Tilt, enabling consistent multi-service environments for development and testing
Built system-level testing capabilities in a fragmented architecture with inconsistent configurations and limited existing test coverage
Refactored CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, and Terraform to improve reliability, reduce failure modes, and streamline deployment processes
Deployed and maintained a Kubernetes-hosted API tooling solution (Hoppscotch) to securely proxy requests across environments and support cross-team workflows
Diagnosed and resolved systemic issues across services, infrastructure, and build pipelines in a complex and evolving codebase
